qqconnect-login-button: Label of the QQ login button on the login form.
qqconnect-loginbutton-help: Help text for the QQ login button.
qqconnect-login: Link text for QQ login in personal menu.
qqconnect-login-link: Alternative link text for QQ login.
qqconnect-special-login-intro: Intro shown on the QQ login special page.
qqconnect-test-mode-title: Title of the test mode notice page.
qqconnect-test-mode-body: Body of the test mode notice page.
qqconnect-error-not-configured: Error shown when APP ID/KEY are not set.
qqconnect-error-invalid-state: Error shown when the OAuth state token does not match.
qqconnect-error-no-code: Error shown when no authorization code returned.
qqconnect-error-token: Error shown when access token request fails.
qqconnect-error-openid: Error shown when OpenID request fails.
qqconnect-error-userinfo: Error shown when user info request fails.
qqconnect-error-openid-bound-other: Error shown when the QQ openid is bound to another user.
qqconnect-error-user-bound-other: Error shown when the current user is bound to a different QQ.
qqconnect-error-auth-failed: Error shown when account linking credentials are invalid.
qqconnect-error-already-bound: Error shown when trying to bind an already-bound QQ.
qqconnect-error-require-bind: Error shown when RequireBind blocks editing.
qqconnect-error-disabled: Error shown when QQ login is disabled.
qqconnect-manage-bound: Message shown when a QQ is bound.
qqconnect-manage-not-bound: Message shown when no QQ is bound.
prefs-qqconnect: Sub-section heading inside the User profile preferences tab for QQ Connect settings.
prefs-personal-qqconnect: Sub-section heading inside the User profile preferences tab for QQ Connect settings. MW 1.43+ may use this key (with tab prefix) for subsection headers.
qqconnect-personal-qqlogin: Personal menu link for QQ login (anon users).
qqconnect-logentry-bind: Log entry; user is the subject.
qqconnect-logentry-unbind: Log entry; user is the subject.
qqconnect-logentry-rebind: Log entry; user is the subject.
qqconnect-logentry-admin-unbind: Log entry; $1 is the target user.
qqconnect-debug-title: Heading shown above debug details on error pages when debug mode is on.
